REASONING: Power Word Stun on Metallic Dragonborn — Unarmored Caster (HP 67 ≤ 150). Auto-stun!
--- Metallic Dragonborn — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.

══ ROUND 2 ══
REASONING: Finger of Death on Metallic Dragonborn — Unarmored Caster. 7d8+30 necrotic.
ACTION: Cast Finger of Death (Level 7 slot, 0 remaining). DC 20 CON save on Metallic Dragonborn — Unarmored Caster.
→ Metallic Dragonborn — Unarmored Caster: CON save [d20:12+4=16 vs DC 20] FAIL! 37 necrotic damage. HP: 30/67
--- Metallic Dragonborn — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 30/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Lich (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:10+9=19 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
══ ROUND 3 ══
